note: Harness primitive (learn-harness-engineering L08 pilot). Each feature = (behavior, verification, state, evidence). State -> passing ONLY via tools/feature_gate.py running the verification command. Do not hand-edit state to 'passing'; the gate controls transitions. Initial states reflect docs/harness/2026-06-04_paper-verify-audit/01_BACKLOG.md (the human doc) — run the gate to reconcile with ground truth.

features.name: HTTP retry/backoff on transient errors
features.behavior: Main fetch path retries once with backoff on a transient 5xx/timeout; does not retry on non-transient 4xx.

features.name: Wayback fallback uses timestamped snapshot
features.behavior: Archive fallback resolves a real snapshot via the availability API (timestamped), distinguishes not-captured from API error, and skips archive when no snapshot.

features.name: soft-404 markers narrowed
features.behavior: soft-404 heuristic does not trip on legit academic pages containing 'error'/'404' as words; still flags specific 'page not found' phrases (EN+KO).

features.name: tiebreak consensus is majority/arbiter (not min)
features.behavior: Tiebreak is not dragged by a single dissent; INACCESSIBLE is excluded from claim consensus; an arbiter breaks a true tie.

features.name: keyword judge clamps Match on missing year/number
features.behavior: Keyword judge clamps Match->Partial when a claim's year or number is absent from the source; keeps Match when present or when the claim has no year/number.

features.name: robust charset decoding (Korean mojibake)
features.behavior: Decoding handles quoted charset, trailing params, <meta charset> fallback, UTF-8 BOM, and never raises on garbage.

features.name: MCP verify_* structured errors + path validation
features.behavior: MCP verify_file/verify_text return {'error': ...} on bad input (missing/oversized file, pipeline error) instead of raising; path is validated.
features.verification: python -m pytest tests/test_mcp_server.py -k 'verify_file or pipeline_error or too_large' -q

features.name: sources._get caps the response read
features.behavior: sources._get caps the read at MAX_RESPONSE_BYTES (DoS/memory guard); the cap constant is bounded.

features.name: metadata API hosts are rate-limited
features.behavior: Per-host rate limiting (MIN_HOST_INTERVAL) applies to metadata API hosts too (NCBI/arXiv fair use).

features.name: test coverage for mcp_server + render_markdown
features.behavior: mcp_server and report.py (render_markdown/json) are covered; split-consensus display is verified.

features.name: offline evidence scoring (--from-evidence)
features.behavior: External fetch/judge evidence JSON is scored with the standard rubric via report_from_evidence + CLI --from-evidence/--extract-only; malformed evidence exits 2 naming the citation index.

features.name: webchat assets rubric drift guard
features.behavior: Portable prompts (EN/KO) and the webchat SKILL.md carry rubric numbers identical to score.py constants and reference the offline entrypoints.

features.name: webchat skill zip builder
features.behavior: tools/build_webchat_skill.py deterministically bundles SKILL.md + the paperverify package + sample evidence + fallback prompt; --check verifies required members.
